app.models package¶

Submodules¶

app.models.character module¶

class app.models.character.Character(**kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: Model

Represents a pirate character in the Grand Line world.

Characters have a class, a race, six core stats, and computed properties for HP, armour class, and proficiency bonus. Each character also has a bounty in Berry.

id¶

Primary key.

Type:

int

name¶

Character name, max 50 characters.

Type:

str

level¶

Character level between 1 and 20.

Type:

int

backstory¶

Optional character history text.

Type:

str

bounty¶

The character’s bounty in Berry, default 0.

Type:

int

class_id¶

Foreign key to CharacterClass.

Type:

int

race_id¶

Foreign key to Race.

Type:

int

strength¶

Base strength stat.

Type:

int

dexterity¶

Base dexterity stat.

Type:

int

constitution¶

Base constitution stat.

Type:

int

intelligence¶

Base intelligence stat.

Type:

int

wisdom¶

Base wisdom stat.

Type:

int

charisma¶

Base charisma stat.

Type:

int

property armour_class: int¶

Calculate armour class as 10 plus dexterity modifier.

Returns:

The armour class value.

Return type:

int

backstory: str¶
bounty: int¶
property bounty_with_level: int¶

Calculate total bounty including a level bonus.

Each level above 1 adds 10% of the base bounty on top. A level 10 character with 1,000,000 Berry base bounty would have 1,900,000 Berry total.

Returns:

The total bounty including level scaling.

Return type:

int

property character_class¶

Retrieve the associated CharacterClass object.

Returns:

The class linked to this character.

Return type:

CharacterClass

charisma: int¶
property charisma_modifier: int¶

Calculate charisma modifier including race bonus.

Returns:

The charisma modifier value.

Return type:

int

class_id: int¶
constitution: int¶
property constitution_modifier: int¶

Calculate constitution modifier including race bonus.

Returns:

The constitution modifier value.

Return type:

int

dexterity: int¶
property dexterity_modifier: int¶

Calculate dexterity modifier including race bonus.

Returns:

The dexterity modifier value.

Return type:

int

id: int¶
intelligence: int¶
property intelligence_modifier: int¶

Calculate intelligence modifier including race bonus.

Returns:

The intelligence modifier value.

Return type:

int

level: int¶
property max_hit_points: int¶

Calculate maximum hit points based on class hit die, constitution, and level.

Returns:

The maximum HP value.

Return type:

int

name: str¶
property proficiency_bonus: int¶

Calculate proficiency bonus based on character level.

Returns:

The proficiency bonus value.

Return type:

int

property race¶

Retrieve the associated Race object.

Returns:

The race linked to this character.

Return type:

Race

race_id: int¶
strength: int¶
property strength_modifier: int¶

Calculate strength modifier including race bonus.

Returns:

The strength modifier value.

Return type:

int

to_dict() → dict[source]¶

Serialize the character to a dictionary for API responses.

Returns:

Full character data including stats, computed values,

bounty, and backstory.

Return type:

dict

wisdom: int¶
property wisdom_modifier: int¶

Calculate wisdom modifier including race bonus.

Returns:

The wisdom modifier value.

Return type:

int

app.models.character_class module¶

class app.models.character_class.CharacterClass(**kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: Model

Represents a playable character class in the Grand Line world.

Each class defines the type of fighter a character is, their hit die for HP calculation, and their primary stat focus.

id¶

Primary key.

Type:

int

name¶

Unique class name (e.g. Swordsman, Navigator).

Type:

str

hit_die¶

The die used to calculate max HP (e.g. 10 for d10).

Type:

int

primary_stat¶

The main stat this class relies on.

Type:

str

description¶

Flavour text describing the class.

Type:

str

description: str¶
hit_die: int¶
id: int¶
name: str¶
primary_stat: str¶
to_dict() → dict[source]¶

Serialize the character class to a dictionary for API responses.

Returns:

A dictionary containing id, name, hit_die, primary_stat,

and description.

Return type:

dict

app.models.database module¶

app.models.race module¶

class app.models.race.Race(**kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: Model

Represents a playable race in the Grand Line world.

Each race provides stat bonuses that are applied on top of a character’s base stats when calculating modifiers.

id¶

Primary key.

Type:

int

name¶

Unique race name (e.g. Human, Fishman, Giant).

Type:

str

description¶

Flavour text describing the race.

Type:

str

strength_bonus¶

Bonus added to strength stat.

Type:

int

dexterity_bonus¶

Bonus added to dexterity stat.

Type:

int

constitution_bonus¶

Bonus added to constitution stat.

Type:

int

intelligence_bonus¶

Bonus added to intelligence stat.

Type:

int

wisdom_bonus¶

Bonus added to wisdom stat.

Type:

int

charisma_bonus¶

Bonus added to charisma stat.

Type:

int

charisma_bonus: int¶
constitution_bonus: int¶
description: str¶
dexterity_bonus: int¶
id: int¶
intelligence_bonus: int¶
name: str¶
strength_bonus: int¶
to_dict() → dict[source]¶

Serialize the race to a dictionary for API responses.

Returns:

A dictionary containing id, name, description,

and a nested bonuses dict with all stat bonuses.

Return type:

dict

wisdom_bonus: int¶

Module contents¶

Grand Line Character Builder
